title: Urubuga rwa IATF
summary: Urubuga rusangi rwa International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: Ishirahamwe IATF ryari rikeneye ikibanza kigenewe abantu bose gisigura neza ico cigwa, kigatanga urutonde rw'imigambi, kikongera kikerekana abatanga intererano intambwe ikurikira bakwiye gutera.
why: Uwo muhora ni urugi rw'imbere rwa IATF. Wubatswe nk'umushinga mutoyi utagira aho uhengamiye ku buryo biguma vyoroshe gusoma, guhindura no kubungabunga ku mugaragaro.
scopeIn: Urupapuro rw'intango rusigura imiterere ya IATF
Urutonde rusangi rw'imishinga ya IATF yemewe, ikora, n'iyibitswe hamwe n'ukuntu imeze, abayibungabunga, ububiko bwayo n'igiteramo
Urupapuro ruvuga ibijanye n'intwaro n'ugushira ahabona
Inkomoko y'icongereza ifise inyubako yiteguriye guhindurwa
Ikoreshwa rya Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
scopeOut: Ibibanza vy'abanyamuryango bigenga, amakonte, canke ingendo zo kwinjira
Kubungabunga code source y'umushinga, iba mu bubiko bwa buri mugambi
Ikiganiro mu gihe nyaco, kibaho muri Discord
Urukurikirane rw'ibibazo ku migambi imwimwe, iboneka mu bubiko bwa GitHub bwa buri mugambi

title: IATF selfie
summary: Ikigereranyo ca kera c'ishirahamwe IATF, cashizwe mu bubiko inyuma y'aho gihagaze mu buryo busanzwe.
problem: Gusuzuma hakiri kare igikoresho gifasha mu bijanye n'ukworoherezwa kw'ibinyabuzima mu rwego rw'ishirahamwe IATF.
why: Ububiko burabikwa ku mugaragaro nk'inyandiko y'igikorwa, naho iterambere rikomeye ryahagaze.
scopeIn: Ikigereranyo ca mbere c'igikoresho gifasha mu bijanye no kworoherezwa gushikira amakuru, kizigamwa ku mugaragaro

title: IATF bot
summary: Robot y'umuryango wa IATF, yatunganijwe inyuma y'ugushika ku mwanya wo guhagarara.
problem: Gukoresha ubuhinga bwa none mu bijanye n'imigenderanire y'ishirahamwe IATF.
why: Ububiko burabikwa ku mugaragaro nk'inyandiko y'igikorwa, naho iterambere rikomeye ryahagaze.
scopeIn: Gushira mu buryo bw'imashini amatati yo ku mbuga ngurukanabumenyi za IATF, ibikwiragizwa ku mugaragaro
